articles.title: Timberwolves vs Nuggets Win Probability for Game 1 at Prediction Markets
articles.summary: Prediction markets are pricing the Timberwolves vs Nuggets Game 1 matchup, with bettors weighing Minnesota's regular season success against Denver's championship pedigree. The opening lines will reveal whether the market believes the defending champions' playoff experience trumps the Wolves' home court advantage and improved roster.

articles.title: Philip Bump: Are prediction markets crowdsourced wisdom — or just prop bets?
articles.summary: Philip Bump questions whether prediction markets actually aggregate collective intelligence or function more like glorified sports betting on political outcomes. The framing matters because mainstream media coverage increasingly shapes how regulators and the public view the legitimacy of prediction markets as forecasting tools versus gambling platforms.

articles.title: The Masters Generated the Largest Pure Sports Handle in Kalshi History, Topping the Super Bowl
articles.summary: The Masters tournament drove more betting volume on Kalshi than any other pure sports event, even surpassing the Super Bowl in total handle. Golf's emergence as a prediction market powerhouse signals that bettors are hungry for action beyond traditional team sports, opening new revenue streams for platforms willing to expand their offerings.

articles.title: Betting on the news raises ethical questions for journalists
articles.summary: Journalists are placing bets on news events they cover, creating potential conflicts of interest between reporting objectively and having financial stakes in outcomes. This threatens the credibility of news sources that prediction markets rely on for accurate information, potentially corrupting the very foundation that makes these markets work.

articles.title: Do prediction markets make money from other peoples’ misery? | Fiona Katauskas
articles.summary: Someone's questioning whether prediction markets profit off human suffering and tragic events. The critique matters because public perception of markets betting on disasters or deaths could trigger regulatory crackdowns that hurt the entire industry.

articles.title: Billionaire Investor Warns Sports Prediction Markets Harm Men
articles.summary: A billionaire investor claims sports prediction markets are damaging men, though the specific harms and reasoning remain unclear from the headline alone. If this gains traction, it could fuel regulatory pushback against sports betting platforms just as they're expanding into prediction market territory.

articles.title: Wanna bet? Washington steps up scrutiny of prediction markets
articles.summary: Washington regulators are ramping up their oversight of prediction markets as the industry gains mainstream traction. This signals either legitimizing regulation that could unlock institutional money, or restrictive crackdowns that could kneecap the fastest-growing corner of the betting world.

articles.title: Trump’s top regulator for prediction markets pledges crackdown on insider trading | CNN Business
articles.summary: Trump's incoming financial regulator plans to crack down on insider trading within prediction markets, signaling tighter oversight of the industry. This could force platforms to beef up their monitoring systems and potentially reduce the information advantages that some sophisticated traders currently exploit.

articles.title: NBA In Active Talks With Kalshi, Polymarket On Prediction Market Deal
articles.summary: The NBA is negotiating partnerships with prediction markets Kalshi and Polymarket to offer official betting products on basketball outcomes. This marks the first major U.S. sports league to embrace prediction markets beyond traditional sportsbooks, potentially legitimizing the space and opening the floodgates for other leagues to follow.

articles.title: A Polymarket trader made $300,000 betting on Biden's pardons, a new analysis shows
articles.summary: A trader on Polymarket correctly predicted which specific individuals Joe Biden would pardon, turning their bets into a $300,000 payday. The win shows how political insider knowledge or sharp political intuition can generate massive returns on niche prediction market bets that most traders ignore.

articles.title: Prediction markets take a surprising turn from polls for OK governor's race
articles.summary: Prediction markets are showing dramatically different odds than traditional polling for Oklahoma's gubernatorial race, suggesting either the polls missed something major or bettors are making a costly mistake. This divergence creates a rare arbitrage opportunity for sharp bettors while testing whether prediction markets truly outperform conventional polling in state-level races.

articles.title: Kalshi Wants Your ID Whether You Gamble or Not (You Know, for Kids)
articles.summary: Kalshi is apparently requiring identity verification from all users, even those who aren't actively trading on their prediction markets platform. This signals either regulatory pressure or a preemptive move to comply with stricter KYC rules that could reshape how prediction markets onboard users and handle casual browsers.
